title: Craftable Cobblemon Cards TCG
description: Easy as it sounds, this datapack allows you to craft the one previously "creative only" Cobblemon Cards. What are you waiting for? You Gotta' Craft Them All!!
body:
Have you wanted to craft the Cobblemon cards from CobbleCardQuest? Me neither, but now you can! Introducing the lastest, updatest, idontknowwhatelsetosay-est datapack that allows the player to craft the Cobblemon cards they have never dreamed of! Using the mods "CobbleCardQuest" and "Immersive Paintings" there are 151 possibilities of Cobblemon cards the player can collect - from a Slowpoke to a Charizard, the possibilities are truly unknown. What will be in the pack? Will it be a Legendary or a Common? Download to figure out and craft em' all! 

** Required Mods **

   Cobble Card Quest: https://modrinth.com/mod/cobble-card-quest
   
   Immersive Paint![In-game crafting example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b18fe63806754258bf7a89a4f71ecaf06c02e27.jpeg)ings: https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-paintings
